title: buchanania lucida var. palembanica
intro: Buchanania lucida var. palembanica, also known as Palemban Buchanania, is a variety of the Buchanania lucida plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Anacardiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Buchanania lucida var. palembanica include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat various health conditions such as skin infections, wounds, and fever. In traditional herbal medicine, Buchanania lucida var. palembanica is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and roots are used to make teas, poultices, and other herbal preparations.
